name: Honey Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, dissolve sugar in evaporated milk and honey.
2. Add grated chocolate, butter, and salt to the pan. Stir until well combined.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
4. Continue boiling until it reaches 234°F (from 238°F) on a candy thermometer.
5. Allow the mixture to cool to room temperature.
6. Once cooled, add vanilla extract for flavoring.
7. Beat the mixture until it is thick, creamy, and holds its shape when dropped from a teaspoon.
